commands.label: Dark Mode
commands.note: Toggles app dark/light theme via registry.

commands.label: Wi-Fi
commands.note: Interface name may vary — run 'netsh interface show interface' to find yours.

commands.label: Open Home Folder
commands.note: Opens your home directory in File Explorer.

commands.label: Ping Monitor
commands.note: Continuous connectivity check — streams output to the in-app terminal.

commands.label: Network Toolkit
commands.content:
ipconfig /all
netstat -an
tracert 8.8.8.8
nslookup google.com
arp -a
